title: Dentists
questions: What comes to mind when you hear the word 'dentist'?
How often do you go to see a dentist?
Do you like visiting the dentist?
What do you think of the smell and sounds at the dentist?
Do you think trips to the dentists are reasonably priced?
Do you have good or bad childhood memories of dentists?
Would you like to look inside peoples' mouths all day as a job?
Talk about a good and bad dentist you've had.
Are your teeth in good condition?
Do you think there is a good choice of dentists in your town?
Do you think about as you sit in the dentist's waiting room?
Do you think dentist's waiting rooms have to have lots of photos of teeth and toothpaste ads, or would you like to see a different decor?
What do you think a day in the life of a dentist is like?
What do you do to look after your teeth?
What do you think dentists can do to make a visit more pleasurable?
Do you worry about fillings / cavities?
Do you think a dentist always tells the patient if he/she makes a big mistake?
Do you think toothpaste technology will mean there'll be no need for dentists one day?
Why do you think some people become dentists and some doctors?
Do you think you'd be a good dentist?
